common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.offline_sub: All duas and audio are available without an internet connection.

home.keep_going: Keep going — you're making great progress.

journey.title: My Journey
journey.choose_hint: Select your journey type to see your personalised step-by-step guide.
journey.sacred_places_sub: Kaaba · Ṣafā · Marwah · Maqam Ibrahim · Zamzam
journey.bookmarks_sub: Your saved duas, grouped by stage

duas.title: My Duas
duas.library_sub: Browse by theme, occasion, or reference
duas.source_text: Duas are drawn from Ṣaḥīḥ al-Bukhārī, Ṣaḥīḥ Muslim, Sunan Abī Dāwūd, Sunan al-Tirmidhī, and established scholarly works. Each duʿāʾ is attributed to its primary source. Practice and wording may differ across the four madhabs (Ḥanafī, Mālikī, Shāfiʿī, Ḥanbalī). Consult a qualified scholar for rulings specific to your school of thought.

sacred_places.title: Sacred Places
sacred_places.madinah_note: Visiting Madinah is not part of the Hajj or Umrah rites, but is a beloved and highly recommended practice.

what_to_expect.title: What to Expect
what_to_expect.find_nearby: Find nearby — opens in Google Maps
what_to_expect.disclaimer: Guidance is general advice. Scholarly opinions may vary by madhab. Always verify requirements with official sources and your local scholar before travel.

bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
bookmarks.empty_body: Open any duʿāʾ and tap the heart icon to save it here.

notes.title: Notes
notes.empty_body: Jot down personal reflections, intentions, or anything on your heart.

save_offline.title: Save for Offline
save_offline.note: Safar works fully offline. All duas are bundled with the app. Saving here confirms your selection.
save_offline.nothing_selected_body: Select at least one duʿāʾ to save.
save_offline.saved_msg: saved to your device. The app works fully offline — no internet needed during your journey.

currency.title: Currency
currency.cached_rates: Using cached rates — connect to update
currency.disclaimer: Exchange rates are for reference only. Actual rates vary by provider. Always check with your bank or exchange bureau.

groups.title: Groups
groups.empty_sub: Be the first to share one.
groups.example_banner: ✦  This is an example group showing you how milestones and Āmeen reactions work.
groups.tap_hint: Tap a member to add them to another group or remove them

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_body: When someone invites you to connect or join a group, it will appear here.

connections.title: Connections
connections.invite_hint: Enter their email address. If they have a Safar account, they'll receive an invite. If not, you can share an invite link.
connections.not_found: No account found with this email.
connections.empty_body: Invite someone by email below. Once they accept, they'll appear here and you can add them to any group instantly.

prepare.title: Prepare
prepare.affiliate_disclosure: Links below may earn Safar a small commission at no extra cost to you.

settings.title: Settings
settings.text_size_sub: Affects all text across the app
settings.high_contrast_sub: Darker text and borders for easier reading
settings.dark_mode_sub: Dark background — easier in low light
settings.reduce_motion_note: Safar respects your device's "Reduce Motion" setting in iOS Accessibility settings.
settings.sign_out_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.delete_confirm: This will permanently delete your account and all your data. This cannot be undone.
settings.contact_support: Please email support@safar.app to delete your account.

auth.privacy_note:
Safar uses email-only authentication.
Your data is never shared with third parties.
auth.check_email_body: We sent a verification link to
auth.check_email_instruction: Click the link to verify your account, then come back and sign in.
auth.error_not_found: No account found with this email.
auth.error_email_exists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.error_weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.error_verify: Please verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
auth.error_fill: Please enter your email and password.
